build_method: local-first (LM Studio qwen3.6 + ddgs/trafilatura retriever); validator-gated; Claude top-up only on flagged niche
finance_trading_boundary: Fundamental/discretionary + corporate finance => Finance. Systematic/quant/markets-execution => Trading (next team). Reserved for Trading: Asness/factor, Taleb/tail-risk, Derman/quant-eng, Dalio+Druckenmiller/hedge-fund-macro, market-microstructure, derivatives, crypto-trading. Macro ECONOMISTS stay in Finance.

cells.valuation-corporate-finance: Valuation, corporate finance, intrinsic value, capital structure.
cells.accounting-fpa-reporting: Forensic accounting, financial reporting, FP&A practice.
cells.behavioral-decision-science: Behavioral finance and decision-making under uncertainty.
cells.capital-markets-ma-private: IPOs, M&A, private equity/VC finance, distress/restructuring.
